Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TYLER MORRIS' Motion To Quash Service is taken off Calendar. No proof of service filed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Continued To Jul-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TYLER MORRIS' Motion To Quash Service is continued to July 17, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 25, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)
